channel.title: BigQuery on Porto Web Vickry
channel.description: Recent content in BigQuery on Porto Web Vickry

item.title: Progress Monitoring Dashboard KNMP
item.description: RoleData Analyst ProblemThe program covers physical construction across 65 regions nationwide. The planning team had no way to monitor each region’s progress in real time — data arrived from 65 different sources in inconsistent formats, with no centralized visibility to identify which regions were falling behind. Without centralized monitoring, intervention decisions were made late and relied on manual reports that weren’t always accurate. SolutionBuilt an interactive Looker Studio dashboard aggregating data from all 65 regions into a single centralized view.
